description: Detects uninitialized memory disclosure in C: buffers declared without initialization then passed to send(), write(), fwrite(), sendto(). Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot track uninitialized arrays across statements without cross-statement analysis). Simplified per D-07: match malloc() calls broadly.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify buffers allocated with malloc() are initialized with memset() or calloc() before being passed to send(), write(), fwrite(), or sendto() to prevent sensitive data disclosure
